title: scrophularia rupestris
intro: Scrophularia rupestris, also known as Rock Figwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Rock Figwort can be prepared into teas, tinctures, or infusions, as well as being used in traditional remedies, such as salves and creams, for topical applications.
